blocks.title: Replace with the system or change
blocks.lede: A bounded security review packet with findings, evidence, trust claims, and a final gate.

items.title: Map trust boundaries
items.summary: List external inputs, auth boundaries, storage boundaries, and privileged paths.

items.title: Verify mitigations
items.summary: Tie every accepted risk to evidence or a follow-up.

findings.title: Replace with finding
findings.body: Describe the issue, exploitability, affected files, and recommended fix.

blocks.title: Trust report
blocks.summary: Claims should point to command, code, or external evidence before the review is accepted.

sources.label: Code review
sources.summary: Replace with the reviewed files and commands.

claims.claim: Security review is ready for downstream implementation.

blocks.title: Accept review?
blocks.prompt: Approve, revise, defer, or block this security review.
